title: Fix OPFSBackend walkDir() graceful error handling
description: PRD §1 gap: 'OPFS walkDir error handling — throws on error instead of gracefully skipping bad entries'. walkDir() should catch errors per-entry and continue iteration rather than throwing and aborting the entire directory walk. When an entry cannot be accessed (permission denied, file removed during iteration), log a warning and skip to the next entry. Match the resilient behavior expected by the PRD. Add test verifying walkDir continues past inaccessible entries.
